reason: Verified agent communication works correctly - agent responded to math question with correct answer
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - page loaded successfully with sidebar showing three agents
Found "QA-20260319-191207-zldm" agent in sidebar with status "idle" - clicked it to open agent detail page
Verified agent status is "idle" - confirmed in agent header and sidebar indicator
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" - message entered in message input and sent button clicked
Waited up to 3 minutes for response - agent responded within 3 seconds with the answer "4."
Verified response mentions "4" - agent's response clearly displays "4." as the answer to the math question
